nasb.text: And He will lift up a standard for the nations And assemble the banished ones of Israel, And will gather the dispersed of Judah From the four corners of the earth.

esv.text: He will raise a signal for the nations and will assemble the banished of Israel, and gather the dispersed of Judah from the four corners of the earth.

cnv.text: 他必向列國豎起旗幟， 召聚以色列被擄去的人， 又從地的四方 聚集分散了的猶大人。

ccb.text: 祂必向各国竖立旗帜， 召集被掳的以色列人， 把分散在世界各地的犹大人聚集起来。

csbs.text: 他必向列国竖起旗帜， 招聚被驱散的以色列人， 又从地的四角聚集被分散的犹大人。
